completed: Integrated bulk selection in FacultyList, StudentList, Subjects, Batches, Dues, and ClassDetail
Implemented bulkDeactivateFaculty and bulkResendCredentials in backend
Implemented bulkDeactivateStudents and bulkAssignMentor in backend
Updated client API wrappers for all administrative modules
Updated api.md with documentation for all new bulk endpoints
Fixed student clearance data visibility issue in Student Portal
Refactored facultySnapshot to Object-based indexing for O(1) lookups
Corrected frontend property mapping in Status.jsx (accessed payload instead of envelope)
pending: Final end-to-end user verification of student dashboard visibility

decisions.context: Student clearance data missing from portal despite backend returning data
decisions.decision: Identified property access mismatch in Status.jsx (component was reading from response envelope instead of nested data object). Also refactored backend snapshot to Object type to prevent flaky array indexing.
decisions.trade_offs: Snapshot schema change required a Mixed type in Mongoose, which reduces some schema-enforced structure but provides massive efficiency for student-side lookups.
